title: Manufacturing Engineer - Siemens India Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Siemens India Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Siemens India Ventures Solutions:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
